name: Ratatouille
recipeIngredient: 3 small zucchini, cut into 1/8 inch slices
1/2 teaspoon sugar (or artificial sugar if diabetic)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion slices in oil until tender.
2. Stir in remaining ingredients except parsley. Reduce heat; cover and simmer 3 minutes.
3. Uncover and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until liquid is evaporated. (Watch carefully.)
4. Turn into serving dish and sprinkle with parsley.
Serving: 1 Serving = 1 Vegetable Choice + 2 Fats
